news_catalyst.headline: SpaceX Consolidating — No Major Catalysts Today
news_catalyst.summary: SPCX is essentially flat (+0.15%) on 0.62x below-average volume — classified as 'Low-volume drift, buyers exhausted.' No major SpaceX news today. The stock has been consolidating between $147 support and $220 resistance. Watch for a Starship launch or Starlink subscriber milestone announcement as potential catalysts.

No Wyckoff signals detected. The 44% gap between current price and $220 resistance offers significant upside if a catalyst emerges.
